title: Korean-Style Savory Stir-Fry
description: A quick and easy stir-fry dish that combines the flavors of Korea with a savory twist. This dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chili flakes and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sliced onions and bell peppers and cook until they start to soften.
Add the diced apple and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Pour in the savory stir-fry sauce and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
